description_long: This lighthouse is a tall, cylindrical structure with a smooth blue exterior and a flat white top. At the summit, there is a circular gallery balcony with a metal railing, and a small flagpole with a flag. The top also features a visible light beacon, protected by a mesh or cage. A metal ladder runs vertically along one side, providing access to the gallery balcony, and there are several small square and round windows distributed along the tower. The base is set on a green platform, suggesting a foundation or grassy area. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, focusing on function and visibility.
description: A tall, blue cylindrical lighthouse with a gallery balcony, light beacon, and vertical ladder, set on a green base. The structure features small windows and a functional, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the smooth blue tower with a single square window and a round port, topped by the gallery balcony and flag.
description_view_1: This angle reveals two square windows, the start of the vertical ladder, and the curved pipe leading to the gallery balcony.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the full length of the ladder, multiple round ports, and the mesh-protected light beacon at the top.
description_view_3: This side view displays the ladder running up the tower, a single square window, and the curved pipe near the top.
